LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF ABS SEAFOOD, INC.'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF ABS SEAFOOD, INC. APPLIES FOR A WRIT OF ATTACHMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT MICHAEL EDWARD BLACK, JR., INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA SEBO AND DBA SEBO RESTAURANT. (APPLICATION, 2.) PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THE PROBABLE VALIDITY OF ITS CLAIM. (CCP 484.090.) THE OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT IDENTIFIES THE ACCOUNT HOLDER AS "SEBO", AND NOT MR. BLACK. (ACKERMAN DECL., EXHIBIT A.) PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PRESENTED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO DEMONSTRATE THAT MR. BLACK DOES BUSINESS AS SEBO OR SEBO RESTAURANT. FURTHER, THE COMPLAINT IS NOT VERIFIED AS AVERRED IN THE APPLICATION. (COMPARE COMPLAINT; WITH APPLICATION, 7A, COOK DECL., P. 1:10-11.) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Application And Application For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff ABS SEAFOOD, INC.'S Application For Right To Attach Order IS Denied. Plaintiff ABS Seafood, Inc. applies for a writ of attachment against Defendant Michael Edward Black, Jr., individually and dba Sebo and dba Sebo Restaurant. (Application, 2.) Plaintiff has not established the probable validity of its claim. (CCP 484.090.) The open book account identifies the account holder as "Sebo", and not Mr. Black. (Ackerman Decl., Exhibit A.) Plaintiff has not presented sufficient evidence to demonstrate that Mr. Black does business as Sebo or Sebo Restaurant. Further, the Complaint is not verified as averred in the Application. (Compare Complaint; with Application, 7a, Cook Decl., p. 1:10-11.) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
